summary: Retention Analytics Dashboard VERIFIED - ALL 16 BACKEND TESTS PASSED + ALL FRONTEND TESTS PASSED. Session tracking (start/heartbeat/end), 5 key metrics, retention curve (7 buckets), preview analytics funnel, trends array, period selector (7d/14d/30d), device breakdown all working correctly. Fixed MongoDB index issue (sessionId -> session_id).
critical_code_review_comments: retention_analytics.py: POST /api/admin/retention/session accepts event=start/heartbeat/end - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: Session start creates record with session_id, started_at, device, status=active - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: Heartbeat updates scroll_depth, actions, duration_seconds - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: End sets duration_seconds and status=ended - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: Session endpoint is open to all users (no auth required) - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: GET /api/admin/retention/dashboard requires admin auth - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: Dashboard returns 5 metrics (avg_session_time, scroll_depth, hook_ctr, continue_rate, dropoff_10s) - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: Dashboard returns retention_curve with 7 buckets (0-10s, 10-30s, 30-60s, 1-3min, 3-5min, 5-10min, 10min+) - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: Dashboard returns preview_analytics (impressions, plays, clicks, play_rate, click_conversion) - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: Dashboard returns trends array with daily data (date, sessions, avg_session_seconds, hook_ctr, dropoff_10s) - VERIFIED
retention_analytics.py: Dashboard supports days parameter (7, 14, 30) - VERIFIED
RetentionDashboard.js: Renders at /app/admin/retention with all components - VERIFIED
RetentionDashboard.js: Metrics grid shows all 5 metric cards with data-testid attributes - VERIFIED
RetentionDashboard.js: Retention curve chart renders with 7 buckets - VERIFIED
RetentionDashboard.js: Autoplay preview funnel renders impressions/plays/clicks - VERIFIED
RetentionDashboard.js: 4 trend charts render (session time, hook CTR, sessions, drop-off) - VERIFIED
RetentionDashboard.js: Device breakdown shows when data exists - VERIFIED
RetentionDashboard.js: Period selector buttons (7d, 14d, 30d) exist and are clickable - VERIFIED
sessionTracker.js: startSession() generates session_id and sends start event - VERIFIED
sessionTracker.js: Heartbeat sent every 30s with scroll_depth and actions - VERIFIED
sessionTracker.js: endSession() sends end event on unmount/visibility change - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: startSession() called on mount, endSession() on unmount - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing sessions and events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retention Analytics Dashboard fully verified. Key findings: 1) Session tracking endpoint is open to all users (no auth), 2) Dashboard endpoint requires admin auth, 3) Fixed MongoDB index issue - dropped old idx_session_id (on sessionId camelCase) and created idx_session_id_snake (on session_id snake_case), 4) Dashboard shows real data: Avg Session 2s (6 sessions), 10s Drop-Off 100% (6/6), Scroll Depth 4 tracked, Device breakdown (Desktop 2s/5, Mobile 1s/1), Preview funnel (38 impressions, 2 plays, 1 click), 5) Session tracking fires on Dashboard mount (4 requests observed during test).

session_start_creates_record.details: POST /api/admin/retention/session with event=start creates session record with session_id, started_at, device, status=active

session_heartbeat_updates_data.details: POST /api/admin/retention/session with event=heartbeat updates scroll_depth, actions, duration_seconds

session_end_sets_status.details: POST /api/admin/retention/session with event=end sets duration_seconds and status=ended

session_tracking_open_to_all.details: Session endpoint is open to all users (no auth required)

dashboard_returns_5_metrics.details: GET /api/admin/retention/dashboard returns avg_session_time, scroll_depth, hook_ctr, continue_rate, dropoff_10s

dashboard_preview_analytics.details: Dashboard returns preview_analytics with impressions, plays, clicks, play_rate, click_conversion

dashboard_trends_array.details: Dashboard returns trends array with daily data (date, sessions, avg_session_seconds, hook_ctr, dropoff_10s)

dashboard_period_selector.details: Dashboard supports days=7, days=14, days=30 parameters

retention_dashboard_ui_renders.details: Retention Dashboard renders at /app/admin/retention with all components

metrics_grid_5_cards.details: Metrics grid shows all 5 metric cards (avg-session, hook-ctr, continue-rate, 10s-drop-off, scroll-depth)

retention_curve_chart.details: Retention curve chart renders with 7 session duration buckets

trend_charts_4.details: 4 trend charts render (session time, hook CTR, sessions, drop-off)

device_breakdown.details: Device breakdown shows Desktop 2s (5 sessions), Mobile 1s (1 session)

period_buttons_clickable.details: Period selector buttons (7d, 14d, 30d) exist and are clickable

dashboard_homepage_loads.details: Dashboard homepage loads with hero, story rows, images from CDN

session_tracking_on_mount.details: Session tracking starts on Dashboard mount (4 requests observed)

database_fix_applied.issue: MongoDB duplicate key error on sessionId: null
database_fix_applied.root_cause: Old index idx_session_id was on 'sessionId' (camelCase) but code uses 'session_id' (snake_case)
